summary: Bridges MultiButton events into MenuView named-input dispatch and leaves an extension hook for extra button logic.
notes: This bridge consumes the global MultiButton_OnEvent callback and forwards it into MenuView_DispatchNamedInput(...).
Override MenuViewMultiButton_AfterDispatch(...) in AppCallbacks if you still need extra non-menu button behavior.
sources: Common embedded UI glue pattern: button event callback routed into a menu state machine.
